title: Supercharge Your Lead Gen with Apollo.io + monday.com

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com community!

Apollo.io is a prospecting and engagement platform, and when paired with monday.com, it makes your CRM even more powerful.

  • Find and import leads from Apollo.io directly into your monday.com boards.
  • Track outreach campaigns alongside your pipeline.
  • Automate follow-ups, reminders, and deal stages.

If you’re looking to generate more leads and keep everything centralized in monday.com, Apollo.io is a solid tool.

Sign up for Apollo.io here!

posts.author: jimy395nue (jimy nue)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing i will figure it out more.
